name: Ammonia
description: Ammonia is a naturally-occuring compound with a chemical formula NH3 and trigonal pyramidal geometry in structure. It displays a colorless gas with a pungent smell. Ammonia is also a byproduct of biological and chemical reactions. Although ammonia is used as a food additive in the anhydrous form and serves as a starting material in pharmaceutical and commercial products, it is caustic and hazardous when concentrated.
